text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Trainer! Thanks for giving me
some time off.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I spent yesterday hanging out in the dorm's
common area, which I haven't been able to do for
a while.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It was able to show my appreciation for
everything the staff does for us by helping clean
the dorm and pitching in with dinner!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to that, I'm fully fired up and ready to
tackle today's training with all I've got!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Kitasan Black made good use of her
day off and is feeling nice and refreshed.
